name: Divider
visual_summary: A Divider is a horizontal line that can be used as a visual separation between elements. It can be used to separate content or to visually group related elements. Developers would typically use a Divider to add a clean separation between sections of content.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Divider
Description: A Divider is a horizontal line that can be used as a visual separation between elements. It can be used to separate content or to visually group related elements. Developers would typically use a Divider to add a clean separation between sections of content.
Style: Minimal, Material, Monochromatic
Interactions: Static
Tags: Layout, Spacing, Separator

- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
